description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a low boundary wall. The structure features a driveway leading to a covered garage at the rear, with a visible vehicle parked inside. The main living area is spacious and open-plan, with large windows on the front and side walls allowing ample natural light. There is a small blue pool or water feature in the backyard, adjacent to a paved outdoor area. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with some green landscaping along the perimeter. The overall design is minimalist, emphasizing clean lines and functional spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a driveway, garage, and a small backyard pool, finished in light gray and white.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the boundary wall with green landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, garage, driveway, and backyard pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage, vehicle, and backyard area with the pool.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open-plan interior and additional windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
